items.description: Identify key phases of penetration testing methodology specific to WiFi networks (e.g., reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, reporting).
Gather detailed techniques and tools used in each phase of WiFi penetration testing.
Research common vulnerabilities and attack vectors specific to WiFi networks.
Compile best practices for conducting WiFi penetration tests, including legal and ethical considerations.
Find case studies or examples of WiFi penetration testing to illustrate methodology in practice.
Organize findings into a structured outline for the penetration testing methodology report.

name: search_documents

arguments.query: WiFi penetration testing techniques and tools
